articles.title: TRUST?
articles.summary: When OpenAI scaled back Instant Checkout for agents, it cited the lack of fraud safeguards as a structural blocker. That's because agent trust can't be inferred. It has to be granted, scoped, and enforced. If AI agents will interact with your product, this is now your problem.

articles.title: Business (KYB) to build KYA
articles.summary: ✅ The missing accountability layer for AI agents

articles.title: WHEN MULTIPLE PRODUCT MANAGERS OWN THE SAME PROBLEM
articles.summary: Uncoordinated PMs create confusion and lose trust. Clear ownership and a unified external voice keep teams fast and aligned.

articles.title: A NEW CHALLENGE FOR SOFTWARE PRODUCT MANAGERS
articles.summary: AI makes building features easy, so the real challenge is deciding what not to build. Strong prioritization is now critical to avoid product bloat.

articles.title: THE WRONG BLACK BOX PROBLEM
articles.summary: AI fails when companies cannot clearly describe how they truly operate. Winning requires making the right knowledge explicit while recognizing what stays human.

articles.title: YOUR STRATEGY ISN'T DYING IN THE ROADMAP. IT'S DYING IN THE INTAKE FORM
articles.summary: Strategy fails at intake, where real decisions happen. Without clear ownership and discipline, teams build low-value features instead of executing strategy.

articles.title: TAKE THE ANALYTICS ROADMAP OFF YOUR BACKLOG AND GO BACK TO SHIPPING PRODUCT
articles.summary: "Can we add reporting?" Reveal [10] is the embedded analytics SDK that ships white-label dashboards, AI Q&A, and 30+ data connectors in your app for a flat fee so you can add all the seats you want. You control the AI and keep all the data, your users get the answers they

articles.title: STOP TALKING ABOUT AI ADOPTION OR TRANSFORMATION. START RUNNING THESE FIVE MOTIONS
articles.summary: AI leaders win by running consistent, high-signal habits, not just strategy. Embedding AI into weekly operations drives faster learning and lasting advantage.

articles.title: THE FOUR LAYERS OF AI MEASUREMENT: A CFO'S FRAMEWORK
articles.summary: AI value must be measured beyond usage, focusing on work, outcomes, and business impact. Companies that define and price clear AI work units will win.

articles.title: NOTHING IS BROKEN. SO WHY DOES EVERYTHING FEEL WRONG?
articles.summary: Systems can improve while drifting away from real-world reality. This hidden misalignment makes everything feel off, even when nothing is broken.

articles.title: WHO'S GOT TIME FOR PRODUCT MARKETING?
articles.summary: Product marketing is now an enabling system that helps teams launch faster through shared tools, data, and messaging. The best companies treat PMM as a company-wide capability powered by customer insight and speed.

articles.title: DISTRIBUTION IS THE FINAL MOAT
articles.summary: In AI, features get copied fast, so distribution is the real advantage.

articles.title: AI IS NOT A PRODUCT — IT'S AN ENVIRONMENT
articles.summary: Resilience and adaptability matter more than efficiency at scale.
